title: CVE-2026-10085: Mattermost RCE
summary: [P1] Mattermost versions 11.7.x <= 11.7.2, 11.6.x <= 11.6.4, 10.11.x <= 10.11.19 are vulnerable to RCE, with no patch available. Exploitation could lead to unauthorized access and data compromise. Why now: No patch is currently available for this vulnerability. (confidence: 0.80)
classification_reasoning: This vulnerability allows for remote code execution, which is a critical issue.
